name: Intezer
description: Intezer connector for Splunk SOAR enables security teams to automate the analysis, detection, and response of threats by integrating Intezer's technology into their Splunk workflows

actions.name: Detonate File
actions.description: Analyze a file from Splunk vault with Intezer

parameters.name: vault_id
parameters.description: File's vault ID

parameters.name: related_alert_id
parameters.description: The alert ID that the file is related to

actions.name: Detonate Hash
actions.description: Analyze a file hash (SHA1, SHA256, or MD5) with Intezer

parameters.name: file_hash
parameters.description: File hash (SHA1, SHA256, or MD5)

actions.name: Get File Report
actions.description: Get a file analysis report based on an analysis ID or a file hash

parameters.name: analysis_id
parameters.description: File analysis ID. The analysis ID is returned when submitting a file or a hash for analysis

parameters.name: file_hash
parameters.description: File's hash (SHA1, SHA256, MD5)

parameters.name: private_only
parameters.description: The "private_only" parameter, used when retrieving analysis reports by file hash, determines database access: "false" (default) uses both public and private databases, consuming additional quota for first-time public access; "true" uses only your private database, conserving quota

parameters.name: wait_for_completion
parameters.description: Whether to wait for the analysis to finish

actions.name: Detonate Url
actions.description: Analyze a suspicious URL with Intezer

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to analyze

actions.name: Get Url Report
actions.description: Get a URL analysis report based on a URL analysis ID

parameters.name: analysis_id
parameters.description: URL analysis ID. The analysis ID is returned when submitting a URL for analysis

parameters.name: wait_for_completion
parameters.description: Whether to wait for the analysis to finish

actions.name: Get Alert
actions.description: Get an ingested alert triage and response information using alert ID

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The alert ID to query

parameters.name: wait_for_completion
parameters.description: Whether to wait for the analysis to finish

actions.name: Submit Alert
actions.description: Submit a new alert, including the raw alert information, to Intezer for processing

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Where the alert came from

parameters.name: raw_alert
parameters.description: The alert raw data in JSON format

parameters.name: alert_mapping
parameters.description: The mapping to use for the alert in JSON formant

actions.name: Submit Suspicious Email
actions.description: Submit a suspicious phishing email in a raw format (.MSG or .EML) to Intezer for processing

parameters.name: vault_id
parameters.description: The vault ID of the email to submit

actions.name: Index File
actions.description: Index the file's genes into the organizational database

parameters.name: index_as
parameters.description: "trusted" or "malicious"

parameters.name: vault_id
parameters.description: File's vault ID

parameters.name: family_name
parameters.description: Family name

parameters.name: file_hash
parameters.description: File's hash (SHA1, SHA256, MD5)
